# Repository Metadata

## Repository Description

Select elements in real webpages and send structured component context to AI agents for faster frontend debugging.

## Short Description (Chinese)

在真实网页中点选元素，快速提取结构化组件上下文，帮助 AI Agent 更快定位和修改前端组件。

## Suggested Topics

- chrome-extension
- frontend
- ai-coding
- debugging
- react
- vue
- devtools
- productivity
